title: Lesson 187: (Grammar) - when; at the time; while; during

intro_cards.title: Temporal Marker: とき (When)
intro_cards.body:
とき (時) means 'when' — at the time of an event or action.

With nouns: [noun]のとき
• 子供のとき、よく泳いだ。(When I was a child, I often swam.)

With verbs — tense matters:
• [non-past] + とき = when about to do / when doing
  食べるとき、手を洗います。(When eating, I wash my hands.)
• [past] + とき = when/after having done
  着いたとき、電話した。(When I arrived, I called.)

• 来るとき (when coming — not yet arrived)
• 来たとき (when they arrived — already happened)
